qa.question: What is the total monthly housing payment (PITI)?

qa.rephrase_note: Same intent (sum of non-mortgage tradeline payments); reworded; answer holds.

qa.rephrase_note: Same referent (most recent of 11, same period); reworded; answer holds.

qa.rephrase_note: Same intent (peak daily-balance chart -> txn count); reworded; answer holds.
